titleStmt.title: SII 9.632: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 632. (A.R. No. 432 of 1928.) ON A SLAB SET UP IN A PRIVATE HOUSE SOUTH OF THE TANK CALLED SANNAKEREKATTE AT BASRUR, COONDAPUR TALUK, SOUTH KANARA DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated Śaka 1471; Kīlaka, Kārtika, śu. 1 corresponding to A.D. 1548 October 2, Tuesday (not verifiable), in the reign of Sadāśivarāya ruling at Vijayanagara. It records that Bemmachaseṭṭi of the family of Kalluseṭṭi restored the maṭha built by Kalluseṭṭi and endowed it with some plots of land and money.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . śrīgaṇādhipatiĒṁnamaḥ śrīsarasvatyāeṁ namaḥ śrīgurubhyō(ṁ) namaḥnirvighnamastu . namastuṁgaśiraścuṁ
bicaṁdracāmaracāravē trayilōkyanagarāraṁbhamūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . śrījayādyudayaśālivāhana
śakavaruṣa 1471 saṁdu vartamāna kīlakasaṁvatsarada kārtika śu 1 lū sadāśivarāyarū vijayanagariya siṁhāsa
nadalū sakala sāṁbrājyavanu pratipālisutiha kāladalu haḍakaḷa baḷiya kalluseṭi kaṭṭisida maṭhavanū Avara saṁtā
nāru saṁtayakaḷiya beṁmacaseṭṭi Ā maṭhavanū jīrnōdhāramāḍisi dharmake biṭadu kalavisarakeya voḷage teṁku taṭi
nalu mukeṟeya teṇe yeraḍanū biḍāruvāra māḍikoṁḍu koṭadu dūḍavaraha ga 80 yidake bāha Akki nāghaṁgalu mu 1
kalunāḍa cittūra guḍeyakēri voḷage tirumaḍahara makaḷu dēu Ā nu �yosaraḍahana kayyalū Āṁta
rāruvārava māḍikoṁḍa bāḷu baṁkaneṁba mu 3 . tōṭipāḷi sahita muḍi maki mallagade hāḷi sahita mu 2 .
meke mu 3 Aṁṇana maki voḷage mu 1 Āṁtu mu 11 maneṭhāu Anubha saha koṭa doḍa varaha 65 ge Aki mu 13 .
naṁdavaḷiya voḷage taṁma mūlada bāḷu baṁkaneṁba bayalu mu ... 0 naḍuvaṇa hāḷi ba mu ... 0 maneṭhāu mallagade mu
1 maki mu 5 Aṁtu mu 7 . Anubha saha teṟu vara ga 1 saha gēṇi Anā mu 12 mattaṁ hāṟunāḍa pākanāḍi voḷage tirumala
bhaṭa mallunāyakana saṁkaranāraṇanavara dēunāyakanavara mūlada bāḷu kaḷiyagade ba mu 1 gōḷiyagade mu 1 meke teṁgina
gade mu 1 . 0 keṟeyabāgilu mu 1 . suṁkadahāḷi Eraḍake mu 3 . 0 Arasaṁṇāḷuvana gadeyiṁda baḍagaṇadu mu . 0
bayalu gadeyiṁ baḍagaṇa meke mu 1 Adaṟa keḷage mu . 0 malla gade mu 1 . 0 Aṁtu bayalu meke maki mu 11 maneṭhāu
Anubha saha biḍāruvāravāgi māḍikoṁḍu beṁmacaseṭi koṭa doḍavaraha ga 64 �yo bāḷige teṟanū tāu hiḍidu tāvē
teṟuvaṁtāgi dēvuluguṁḍada kōṭaṇa Aṁgiya kayyalūḍikoṁḍadu ba mu 4 . 0 meke mu 3 ... 0 ge hoṁna moda ga 81 ...
ge koṭa varaha ga 6 . 0 yidake teṟa kaḷaci baha Aki nā mu 12 mataṁ nālvattu nāḍakeḍalūra voḷage jaṁni nāraṇakaṁbaḷiya hiriyara
mūladalu keheya Āruvāra seṭiyaneṁba ba mu 3 baḷiya hāḷi ba mu . 0 yidake koṭa varaha ga 40 �yo bāḷige kōṭīśvaradē
varige dēvasa nā Ā mu 1 maṭhake naḍava Ā nā mu 6 mataṁ kuṁdamaṁguladoḷage taṁma mūlada bāḷa catusīme mūḍalu U
ḍupara hebārana mattaṁ Uḍupara narasiṁga kōṭinātha dēvasvada kariyavoḍeyara Uppugaḍiyiṁda paḍuvalu
teṁkalu rāmacaṁdradēvara gade gōjara kaṁbaḷiyavara gaḍiyiṁda baḍagalu paḍuvalu kuṁdamaṁgulada nēraṁ baḷi
ya naḍava vōṇiya gaḍiyiṁ mūḍalu baḍagalu vōṇiyiṁ teṁkalu �yo nālku gaḍi voḷage bayalu meke makki
saha bittuva muḍi 54 yidakke teṟu mu 10 hā 10 maṭhake naḍava Akki nā mu 2 hā 10 varaha ga 90 mattaṁ
siṁgarivoḍeyara mēle meyisālada varaha ga 50 kke baḍi varaha ga 5 yidara Artha baṁdarū
maṭhakke Uḷadu yidake dina 2 ke naḍava dharma jana 2 lekkadalu naḍasuvarū �yo Āruvārada bāḷugaḷa Ardha
baṁdare paḍuvakēriya halaru seṭikāṟarū tegedukoṁḍu mattoṁdu sarvasvava māḍikoṁḍu dharmava naḍa
suvarū . dānapālanayōrmadhyēdānāśrēyōnupālanaṁ . dānāttu svargamavāpnōti pālanādacutaṁ padaṁ .
Digital edition of SII 9.632 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
